name: Apple Brown Betty
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine the bread crumbs and melted butter.
3. Place about 1/3 of this mixture on the bottom of an 8-inch baking dish.
4. Cover with a layer of about half the apples.
5. Stir together the brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and lemon rind.
6. Sprinkle about half of this sugar mixture over the apple mixture in the baking dish.
7. Mix together the water, lemon juice, and vanilla and sprinkle half on top of the sugar layer.
8. Reserve the remaining lemon juice and water.
9. Add another layer of crumbs, then the raisins.
10. Cover with the remaining apples, sprinkle with the remaining sugar mixture, then lemon juice and water.
11. Place the last third of the crumb mixture on top.
12. Bake in the preheated oven for about 40 minutes, until the apples are nearly tender.
13. Remove the cover and raise the heat to 400 degrees F.
14. Let the top brown for about 15 minutes.
15. Serve with whipped cream or ice cream.
